tree.name: Ochai Agbaji
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: TOR traded Ochai Agbaji, cash, and 2032 2nd (TOR own) to BKN; LAC traded cash to BKN; LAC traded Chris Paul to TOR; BKN traded Vanja Marinkovic to LAC. Toronto and LA also received trade exceptions.
tree.note: Kansas guard, 2022 MOP. Originally drafted #14 by CLE. BKN acquired him as a young wing asset at the 2026 trade deadline.

assetsGivenUp.name: Vanja Marinkovic
assetsGivenUp.note: Serbian guard, BKN's 2019 2nd-round pick (#60). Draft rights held by BKN, sent to LAC in 3-team Chris Paul trade.
